Glass Workflow

Every panel, button, and CTA is built to feel like the cockpit in your reference.

How it works
  1. 1Open the studio workspace
  2. 2Start a live session or record a new take
  3. 3Use chat and intake when you need support
  4. 4Move into the studio without friction
Need help live?

Use the floating chat bubble anytime to jump back here and request access, support, or a live walkthrough.
